creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
Exp-run can't start, pkg can't fetch:

=======================<phase: fetch          >============================
===>  License BSD2CLAUSE accepted by the user
=> pipefail is not in /usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg/distinfo.
=> Either /usr/ports/ports-mgmt/pkg/distinfo is out of date, or
=> pipefail is spelled incorrectly.
*** Error code 1
